taxonomy: Parablechnum rheophyticum is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand, and its classification places it within the phylum Pteridophyta. The genus Parablechnum is closely related to Blechnum, and both are part of the Blechnaceae family. Within the Blechnaceae family, Parablechnum rheophyticum is a distinct species due to its unique characteristics and growth habits. Its classification is further supported by its morphological and molecular features.
